name: astro-social-ai-component
description: Compact share + "summarize with AI" bar for Astro: deep-links posts to social networks and AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Grok, Mistral, Google AI). Self-contained, themable, dependency-free.
author: David Carrero Fernández-Baillo (https://carrero.es)
